positive: A stylized, minimalist composition featuring a whimsical forest creature, perhaps a deer or fox with bioluminescent markings, surrounded by stylized oversized flora like glowing mushrooms and ferns. The style should be highly graphic and vector-art inspired, combining intricate line work with solid blocks of contrasting color. Use deep indigo blues, emerald greens, and pops of vibrant electric teal and golden yellow for the glow. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed for seamless textile printing, utilizing clean silhouettes and strong, dramatic contrast against a simple background. Studio lighting, flat graphic design aesthetic, highly detailed illustration, pop art influence, perfect symmetry, maximal contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, grainy, grayscale, realistic photo, photorealism, cartoon, messy composition
